---
title: "Research Assistants"
anchor-sections: false
---

::: {layout-ncol="2"}
![](images/rumi.jpg){width="338"}

![](images/yori.jpeg){width="338"}

![](images/rumi2.jpg){width="336"}

![](images/moni.jpg){width="333"}

![](images/tweetie.jpg){width="332"}

![](images/toshie.jpg){width="328"}
:::
